reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied when a checked-in evidence bundle records direct or verified proof for the claim boundary.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the checked-in install/packaging evidence bundle: distribution tests protect the standalone binary installer and packaged skill sync, and a temp-repo install smoke materializes the bundled skill without requiring another scaffold.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep this claim covered by distribution-surface tests plus install command smoke whenever install.sh, packaged plugins, or bundled skill materialization changes.
